examples: I told everyone who was ready to listen that I had material with pentagonal symmetry.
It offers a PENTAGONAL profile for good bite on the ball resulting in better spin potential.
Flowers: Sepals strongly ascending to appressed, longest 4 – 5 mm, corolla globose-urceolate, pentagonal, to 10 x 8 mm in diameter, petals apiculate, orange -red.
The fifth, the dodecahedron, has pentagonal faces.
